chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-787 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 08.11.2016. Mr. Omparkash H. Karmani, Advocate for respondents 6 & 8 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = Petitioner No.2-Ghulam Rasool is present in person and submits that his Counsel is out of station. Today, the respondents No.6 & 8 are also present in person and they deny the allegations as mentioned in the petition. This petition is disposed of with the directions that police will provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, if they are approached with such a request and private respondents No.6, 7 & 8 are particularly restrained from causing any harassment or extending threats to the petitioners in any manner whatsoever. However, the parties will pursue their remedy in the pending criminal case. With these observations, the present constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
